svg.text: EVALUATION PIPELINE — BIG-O COMPLEXITY PER STAGE
C = contracts · S = scenarios · T = time-steps · R = risk factors · E = events/contract · G = GPU threads · P = CPU cores
for t=0..T: apply R risk factors
O(C · S · T · R / G) + O(C)
kernel dominates at scale · D2H-free · latency driven by compute
PCIe bandwidth is the bottleneck — kernel cost hidden behind D2H
compute dominates · no transfer cost · predictable linear scaling
